name: MAGNA-TILES microMAGS 26-Piece Travel Magnetic Construction Set – Bold Colors, The Original Magnetic Building Brand
bullets: What’s Included: 26 microMAGS magnetic tiles, including: 4 Right Triangles, 4 Isosceles Triangles, 6 Equilateral Triangles, 12 Squares. The metal tin packaging provides both convenient storage and baseplate for builds on the go.
What Makes It Unique: This set is a must-have travel companion for family trips – whether by plane, train or automobile – and restaurants, too
Developmental: Encourages the development of hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills, while spurring creativity.
Great for Gifting: Makes a great gift for kids ages 3 plus who want to build anywhere and everywhere.
More to Explore: MAGNA-TILES microMAGS plus Classic sets are a winning combo
Always Compatible: All pieces are compatible with and complementary to all other MAGNA-TILES sets, including all Classic MAGNA-TILES sets.
description: Good things come in small packages – especially packages that can be reused for both storage and building on-the-go! The MAGNA-TILES® microMAGS line is the next evolution in magnetic building, and it’s also 100% compatible with every MAGNA-TILES® piece that has come before it. These smaller pieces are great to play with on their own, and also provide added details to kids’ builds with existing MAGNA-TILES® sets.  Experience the big potential to take creativity, learning, development, and imagination anywhere – with the power of a portable piece that’s 75% smaller than traditional tiles.

reviews.name: Paige
reviews.title: Perfect for on-the-go play!
reviews.body: We love these! They’re perfect for restaurants or anytime we’re on the go. The smaller size makes them super easy to pack, and they keep my daughter entertained the whole time. The magnets are strong, the quality is great, and they’re just as fun as the full-size ones. Such a great travel-friendly toy!

reviews.name: Brylee
reviews.title: The BEST for Travel!
reviews.body: I recently got the Magna-Tiles microMAGS 26-Piece Travel Magnetic Construction Set for my kids, and it has quickly become a favorite — especially for travel and on-the-go play! For the price, this set is an excellent value and perfect for little hands that love to build and create.

reviews.name: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Perfect Travel-Sized MAGNA-TILES for Creative Play Anywhere
reviews.body: These MAGNA-TILES microMAGS are absolutely brilliant, especially for travel. The compact size and sturdy metal tin make them easy to toss into a bag, and the tin doubles as a baseplate, which is perfect for building on planes, in restaurants, or on road trips. This set includes a great mix of shapes, giving kids plenty of options to build creatively without feeling limited.

reviews.name: destinyautumnpayne
reviews.title: Perfect for travel & on-the-go play
reviews.body: These are perfect for travel and tossing in a diaper bag. The smaller size makes them super easy to bring anywhere without taking up much space, but they still have the same fun and quality as regular Magna-Tiles.
